name: Gears Unchained: The rise of revolution
short_description: In a futuristic city under dictatorship, a brave mechanic with an illegal electronic arm rises up against the dictator. Face dangers, unravel intrigues and overcome deadly obstacles, approaching an epic final showdown.
detailed_description:
DEMO - STUDENT PROYECT

In a futuristic city choked by dictatorship, a brave mechanic stands up against the dictator. With his illegal electronic arm as a weapon, he plunges into a world of shadows and dangers, challenging the limits of technology. Facing the dictator's henchmen, unraveling intrigues and overcoming deadly obstacles, our protagonist gets closer and closer to an epic showdown against the dictator.

-Futuristic world in Egypt
-Action and stealth
-Companions and allies
-Character development and customization
-Captivating narrative

Spanish - Spain*, English, French, German, Japanese, Catalan
